channel.title: Posts on ZenGeekLabs
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on ZenGeekLabs

item.title: My First Post
item.description: The first sample post on this blog.

item.title: A Bigger Toolbox Is Not the Goal. Methods Are.
item.description: A short note for tool lovers: the real value is not how many tools you collect, but whether you can keep the methods they taught you.

item.title: Building a Writing System Matters More Than Finding the Next Tool
item.description: A longer sample post for testing table of contents, long paragraphs, lists, and blockquotes.

item.title: A Few Hugo Snippets That Are Enough to Keep This Blog Growing
item.description: A sample post for testing code blocks, monospace fonts, and configuration snippets.

item.title: Reading Notes Do Not Need to Be Complete. Leave Searchable Anchors First.
item.description: A short sample post used to test homepage lists, archives, and tag pages with multiple entries.
